expected_query: were Shramik Special trains missing routes?
expected_response:
Thanks for asking! I couldn't find something related to your query but PIB Fact Check has issued a similar fact check:

Watch: https://youtube.com/watch?v=CGdUdYrjiwY&t=40m10s


🔎 Check the fact check here: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1265280924960227329?s=20

If you are not satisfied with this information or wish to report similar misinformation, you can reach out to PIB Fact Check at:

📞 +91 8799711259
📧 factcheck@pib.gov.in
keywords: Shramik trains not lost fact check
Indian Railways clarification on lost trains

expected_query: Did 40 trains really get diverted and 10 people have lost their lives in trains due to hunger.?
expected_response:
Thanks for asking! I couldn't find something related to your query but PIB Fact Check has issued a similar fact check:

Claim 1: 40 trains are diverted from their route.

#PIBFactcheck:This is INCORRECT. Trains have not been lost. Congestion due to 80% Shramik spl trains going to UP & Bihar. Thus, trains diverted to reach destinations by other feasible routes as per practice followed in regular ops.

Claim 2 : 10 people have lost their lives in trains due to hunger.

#PIBFactcheck: This is FakeNews.No such deaths due to hunger have been reported. Cause of death can't be determined without an autopsy conducted through proper legal procedure. Please refrain from spreading unverified news.
🔎 Check the fact check here: https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1265262697966374914?s=20  

https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1265238612339089408?s=20

If you are not satisfied with this information or wish to report similar misinformation, you can reach out to PIB Fact Check at:

📞 +91 8799711259
📧 factcheck@pib.gov.in

expected_query: senior citizens above 75 years of age will no longer have to pay taxes
expected_response:
Thanks for checking! Here’s what I found:

A message circulating on social media claims that as India commemorates 75 years of its Independence, senior citizens above 75 years of age will no longer have to pay taxes.

#PIBFactCheck

✔️This message is fake

✔️Senior citizens above 75 years, with only pension and interest income, are exempt from filing ITR (as per Section 194P)  

✔️Taxes, if applicable, are deducted by the specified bank after computing the income and eligible deductions


🔎 Check the fact check here:  https://x.com/PIBFactCheck/status/1873312597715660800?s=20
